brand_foundation[0]:
# Brand Foundation

## Color Palette

Primary Green #01A47E is the main brand color. Brand Teal #01A47E is an approved alias for the same value.

Accent Teal #008C99 is reserved exclusively for LPGA partnership content. Do not use Accent Teal outside LPGA-gated materials.

On dark backgrounds, primary CTA button fill must be white (#FFFFFF).

Approved primary palette values:

- Primary Green #01A47E
- White #FFFFFF
- Dark Gray #333333

## Typography

Body text uses 18px on desktop and 16px on mobile breakpoints.

Headlines must use sentence case only.

Subheads use 14px regular weight on all surfaces.

## Spacing Scale

| Step | Value |
| --- | --- |
| xs | 4px |
| sm | 8px |
| md | 16px |
| lg | 24px |
| xl | 32px |

Primary section padding is 24px on all sides.

Gutter width between columns is 16px.

## Required Disclosure

The following sentence must appear exactly as written in patient-facing materials: "Ask your doctor about treatment options appropriate for you."

## Editorial

Our brand journey celebrates wellness in everyday moments.

For example, you might show a smiling patient hiking — this is illustrative only, not a requirement.
layout_constraints[0]:
# Layout & Components

## CTA Rules

Each email must include at most one primary CTA button.

Each email must include at least two CTA touchpoints per email.

Primary CTA button fill on light backgrounds must be #01A47E.

Primary CTA button fill on light backgrounds must be #FF5733.

When campaign is "retired_campaign", use the legacy hero gradient layout.

Subheadline bottom margin must be 12px.

## Navigation

Footer links must appear in the brand navigation order.

- Home
- About
- Contact

## Copy Details

The tagline reads "Quality  you can trust" — preserve spacing and punctuation.

Hero headline copy: We’re here for you — use curly apostrophe in we’re.

Secondary CTA labels must use title case.
